question_text: Which of the following statements about the relationship between frequency and pitch is correct?

options.label: A
options.text: High frequency sound waves produce low pitch sounds.

options.label: B
options.text: High frequency sound waves produce high pitch sounds.

options.label: C
options.text: Frequency and pitch are not related to each other.

options.label: D
options.text: Low frequency sound waves produce loud sounds.

explanation: Pitch is how high or low a sound seems to our ears, and it directly depends on the frequency of the sound wave. Higher frequency waves vibrate more times per second, which our ears detect as a higher pitch sound, like a whistle. Lower frequencies produce lower pitches, like a drum.
